title: Figma Tokens Publisher Config
description: Configuration for scripts/figma/index.mjs — how compiled CSS custom properties are mapped to Figma variable collections, scopes, code syntax, and human-readable aliases.

$schema.description: Reference to this JSON Schema for editor validation.

_comment.description: Free-form note ignored by the loader.

collections.description: Ordered Figma collection definitions. Order matters: dependencies (global colors/space, density, layout) must precede the collections that alias them.

patterns.description: Lowercased substring matches; a token is excluded if its name contains any entry.

exact.description: Exact CSS custom-property names to exclude (matched case-insensitively).

scopeRules.description: Ordered glob → Figma scope rules. First match wins; falls back to ALL_SCOPES.

codeSyntax.description: Per-platform Figma Code Syntax templates. Supports ${name}, ${kebab}, ${camel}. Keys starting with '_' are ignored.

humanReadableMap.description: Map of designer display name (key) to CSS custom-property name (value, must start with '--'). One CSS variable can appear as the value of multiple entries to expose it under several display names.

_comment.description: Free-form note ignored by the loader.

additionalProperties.description: CSS custom-property name the display-name key resolves to.

name.description: Collection display name shown in Figma.

hiddenFromPublishing.description: When true, the collection and every variable it contains are hidden from publishing in Figma (designers cannot publish them to a library). Defaults to false.

humanReadable.description: When present, this collection is populated from these entries (display name → CSS var) instead of CSS token scanning. filter.include may be empty.

include.description: CSS variable name prefixes; a token is included if it starts with at least one (OR). May be empty only for humanReadable collections.

exclude.description: CSS variable name prefixes; a token is excluded if it starts with any (OR).

modes.description: Mode list; index 0 is the default/base mode.

name.description: Mode display name shown in Figma.

source.description: Which parsed CSS variable map backs this mode.

pattern.description: Glob-like pattern matched against token names (* → .*, ? → .). Matched case-insensitively.

scopes.description: Figma variable scopes applied when the pattern matches.
